scope: wave22 report-sync repair for the renamed deadlock mixed-language qrel and active refusal metrics
learner_facing_quality_improvement: Learner-facing RAG evaluation artifacts now point at the current deadlock symptom query id and keep the active refusal metrics consistent, so paraphrase/cohort dashboards stop mixing stale query keys with current qrels.
notes: This wave only repaired report-side drift; the qrel fixture was already updated in the worktree and was not modified further.
r3_v22_cohort_eval_full.json remains intentionally below the 94.0 floor, but it no longer fails alignment or metric-consistency checks.
Historical pre-v22 cohort reports still contain the pre-rename deadlock query id and should be queued separately if they remain user-visible.
